nodes.name: Zosterops
nodes.summary: Zosterops（Zosterops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Sri Lanka white-eye、Black-capped white-eye、Ashy-bellied white-eye等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: Southern yellow white-eye
nodes.summary: Southern yellow white-eye（Zosterops anderssoni）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Southern yellow white-eye。

nodes.name: Southern yellow white-eye
nodes.summary: The southern yellow white-eye (Zosterops anderssoni) is a bird species in the family Zosteropidae. It is found in parts of southern Africa. It was formerly considered conspecific with the African yellow white-eye. The southern yellow white-eye was formerly treated as a subspecies of the African yellow white-eye, (renamed the northern yellow white-eye), (Zosterops senegalensis) but it is now considered as a separate species based on the phylogenetic relationships determined in a molecular study in 2013. Three subspecies are recognised: Z. a. anderssoni Shelley, 1892 – east and south Angola and north Namibia to southwest Tanzania, west Mozambique and north South Africa Z. a. tongensis Roberts, 1931 – southeast Zimbabwe, south Mozambique and northeast South Africa Z. a. stierlingi Reichenow, 1899 – east and south Tanzania, east Zambia, Malawi and north Mozambique Its diet consists of insects, fruits, seeds, and grains. References
nodes.shortSummary: The southern yellow white-eye (Zosterops anderssoni) is a bird species in the family Zosteropidae. It is found in parts of southern Africa.
